Terms

Release conditions summary

TableTop Nexus is distributed as downloadable desktop software. You may install and use the published builds subject to the repository license and any packaged third-party license notices.

Mods, creator content, and exported files remain your responsibility. Do not upload content you do not have the right to distribute.

The software is provided on an as-is basis unless a separate commercial support or warranty policy is published for a specific build or customer agreement.

You must not remove attribution, bundled license notices, or platform security warnings from redistributed packages. If you share installers, link back to the official release page so users can verify checksums and release notes.

These summary terms are intended for the current public indie release. If the product distribution model changes materially, DigiSolUK may publish updated formal terms. Last updated: 2026-04-07.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
